_meta.description: Full system memory. Read this file at session open before taking any action. Updated every sprint. Do not invent structure not present here.
_meta.stack: React 19 + Tailwind 4 + Express 4 + tRPC 11 + Drizzle ORM + MySQL + Puppeteer (headless Chromium v146)

scoring_framework.william_rule: Must reference at least two lenses. No invented reasoning. Example: 'Sagaponack earns a Christie's Intelligence Score of 9.4 because acquisition basis is supported by replacement cost floor and strong ultra-prime exit velocity.'

live_url_architecture.principle: Every document the institution produces lives at a permanent URL on the platform. The PDF is downstream of the live URL — Puppeteer photographs the rendered URL and returns the file.
live_url_architecture.doctrine: Doctrine 31 — Google Drive Default. The institution lives in Google Drive. The platform reads from it. The platform never replaces it.
live_url_architecture.puppeteer_status: CONFIRMED — headless Chromium v146 at /usr/bin/chromium works in Manus hosting environment. Tested April 12, 2026.
live_url_architecture.pdf_endpoint: GET /api/pdf?url=/pro-forma → Puppeteer opens live URL, screenshots, returns PDF

pdf_exports.doctrine: The live URL is the master. The PDF is the photograph. Puppeteer photographs the live URL and produces the PDF. No separate PDF code. No separate data layers. No jsPDF for new documents.

legacy_jspdf_generators.note: These eleven jsPDF generators exist from Sprints 1–8 and remain operational. They will be migrated to Puppeteer one document at a time as live URL renderers are built.

cronkite_standard: No dashes in TTS scripts — dashes cause William to pause awkwardly
Round numbers only — say 'two point three million' not 'two point three four million'
No date spoken aloud — William does not announce the date
No schedule language — William does not say 'every morning' or 'every evening'

william_keywords.doctrine: Audio is bounded to four canonical commands only per SD-9b / Doctrine 33. No audio for Property Reports, CMAs, dossiers, agendas, or any other document.

founding_letter.text: In 1766, James Christie built something rare — a firm that families trusted at their most vulnerable moments. Estate settlements. Generational transitions. The quiet decisions that define a family's future. He earned the privilege of advising because he listened before he spoke. Christie's International Real Estate Group carries that same standard to the East End today. We do not pursue listings. We earn the counsel of families who are ready to think clearly about what they hold, what they build, and what they leave behind. If you are asking questions you have never put in writing, we are the right conversation.
founding_letter.attribution: Ed Bruehl, Managing Director · Christie's International Real Estate Group · East Hampton
founding_letter.google_doc_source: pending — to be created and linked

doctrine_library.count_note: 38 main locks + 3 sub-doctrines (31.4 RETIRED, 31.5, 31.6) = 41 canonical total. Reconciled by Perplexity April 13, 2026 — PROJ-027 stray DOCTRINE label removed. Council-approved canonical count.
doctrine_library.council_brief_framing: /council-brief is a standard Sprint 9 document surface route — same queue as /flagship-letter, /james-christie-letter, /mission-model, /bike-card, /uhnw-wealth-path-card. It is NOT a gate document for the Ilija meeting. Ed mirrors the live dashboard to the screen at Rockefeller Center. No Pro Forma walk. No PDF export. No talking points. Recalibrated April 13 2026 per Ed + Claude directive.

locks.title: Authority Must Whisper
locks.summary: Authority must whisper, not shout. No proof-point energy. No superlatives.

locks.title: Source of Truth Truthfulness
locks.summary: When data sources disagree, the platform tells the truth. Tiebreak rule: most recent primary source wins. If no tiebreak is possible, the platform surfaces the disagreement rather than choosing silently. Locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: Cut Copy Before Utility
locks.summary: Cut copy before utility. Every word earns its place.

locks.title: Overlays Remain Subtle
locks.summary: Overlays remain subtle. No heavy gradients over institutional photography.

locks.title: No Proof-Point Energy
locks.summary: No badges, no award banners, no 'top producer' language.

locks.title: Institutional Restraint
locks.summary: Institutional restraint over decoration.

locks.title: UHNW Font Discipline
locks.summary: 14pt body minimum on client-facing surfaces. 12pt floor for sub-headers and labels. Below 12pt only for footers and thank-you lines. Minimum 28pt headlines.

locks.title: PDF Button Consistency
locks.summary: PDF button canonical location: top right of each document card. Document-specific labels (not generic 'Download PDF'). Consistent throughout.

locks.title: Cronkite Standard
locks.summary: No dashes in TTS scripts. Round numbers only. No date spoken aloud. No schedule language.

locks.title: TTS Model Lock
locks.summary: ElevenLabs eleven_turbo_v2. Voice ID N2lVS1w4EtoT3dr4eOWO. Do not change without Ed's approval.

locks.title: Audio-Print Pairing
locks.summary: Audio pairing automatic for documents under 2000 words, summary only for longer. Audio bounded to four William keywords only (NEWS, LETTER, FLAGSHIP, BRIEF). All other PDFs have no audio.

locks.title: CIS Is Not a Sales Tool
locks.summary: The CIS is a filter. It is not a sales tool. No invented reasoning.

locks.title: We Do Not Pursue Listings
locks.summary: We earn the counsel of families. No pursuit language anywhere.

locks.title: AnewHomes Naming
locks.summary: AnewHomes is always one word. Never 'Anew Homes' or 'ANEW Homes'.

locks.title: No Website URL in Contact Blocks
locks.summary: No website URL in any contact block on any PDF or document. O: 631.771.7004 required on all client-facing PDFs.

locks.title: Hagler Standard
locks.summary: Every deliverable must be able to withstand the scrutiny of a hostile expert. No duct tape. No temporary fixes. No scaffolds.

locks.title: Ricky Filter
locks.summary: Would Richard Bruehl (Ricky) be proud of this? Strategic mentor standard applied to every deliverable.

locks.title: No Date Spoken Aloud
locks.summary: William does not announce the date in any spoken script.

locks.title: No Schedule Language
locks.summary: William does not say 'every morning' or 'every evening' in any spoken script.

locks.title: No Website URL on External Surfaces
locks.summary: christiesrealestategroupeh.com does not appear on any external-facing surface except as an operational instruction to the reader (e.g., 'open the platform and click through every tab').

locks.title: CIREG Brand Color Lock
locks.summary: Gold: #C8AC78 (oklch 0.73 0.07 72, PMS 466C). Charcoal: #384249 (oklch 0.33 0.02 220). Do not change without brand approval.

locks.title: Research Library
locks.summary: Source library has master index live URL (/sources or /library). Every document source is indexed.

locks.title: Platform Is the Relationship
locks.summary: The platform is not a marketing tool. It is the relationship itself. Every interaction builds trust.

locks.title: Platform Is the Relationship — Corollary
locks.summary: The platform never replaces the operator. If the platform fails, the operator still has the institution. Google Drive is the fallback. Locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: Soli Deo Gloria
locks.summary: All glory to God alone. The institution serves the people.

locks.title: The 2032 Operator Standard
locks.summary: The 2032 operator reads doctrine plus letters plus cards plus briefs plus dossiers plus the last 30 days of Flagship AI-Letter to operate the institution. Every decision today is being made for the operator who will be running it in 2032.

locks.title: Banker Model Anchored
locks.summary: Banker Model anchored to RL-002 evidence base. No invented projections.

locks.title: AI Brand Template
locks.summary: When the AI Brand Template ships, it operationally enforces five doctrines at once: brand discipline, UHNW font discipline, PDF button consistency, audio pairing, source library indexing.

locks.title: Flagship AI-Letter Daily Update Cadence
locks.summary: Single end-of-day update. Not iterative throughout the day. The letter reflects the closed state of the day. Locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: McKenzie Mentor Model
locks.summary: Every deliverable gets a McKenzie pass before shipping. Ask: what would the short seller with photographic memory say about this? Hostile to the institution's claims. Catches drift, sharpens claims, prevents performance of legitimacy. Locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: Doctrine Retirement
locks.summary: Doctrines may be retired via quarterly review. Retired doctrines are archived, not deleted. Locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: The Council Is the Flagship Team
locks.summary: The AI council (Claude, Manny, Perplexity, Grok, Gemini, ChatGPT) are Flagship Team members alongside the humans. Doctrine 30 locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: Google Drive Default
locks.summary: The institution lives in Google Drive. The platform reads from it. The platform never replaces it. Every document source is a Google Doc or Google Sheet that Ed owns and can open directly. If the platform fails, the operator still has the institution. Locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: Notion Structural Layer — RETIRED
locks.summary: Notion was designated as the structural layer on April 12, 2026. Retired same day in favor of Trello per Doctrine 31.6 (Tool Selection by Team Adoption). Angel does not use Notion. Hagler standard: use the tool the team will actually open. Notion is no longer part of the institutional architecture.

locks.title: Three-Layer Institutional Architecture
locks.summary: Layer 1 — Content: Google Drive (Docs + Sheets). Ed owns every file. Source of truth for all data. Layer 2 — Structure: Trello. Board A — Institutional Mind Map (https://trello.com/b/6zYtB3hZ/christies-flagship-trello). Board B — Christie's SOP (Eileen's 175-card structure adapted for East Hampton). Indexes and links to Layer 1. Layer 3 — Performance: Christie's EH Dashboard. Live data, charts, PDFs, TTS, CIS scores, pipeline. Reads from Layer 1. Each layer has a distinct role. Layers are mutually independent. The connective tissue between the content layer (Google Drive) and the structural layer (Trello) is the Trello-to-Google Drive integration. Every Trello card representing an entity or document or doctrine lock attaches its Google Drive source file as a card attachment. Click the card, see the linked file, open the source. The two layers are joined by direct file linking. Trello's native Google Drive integration enabled April 12, 2026. Locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: Tool Selection by Team Adoption
locks.summary: The right tool is the one the team will actually open every day, not the theoretically best tool. Angel is the operational hinge of the office. Angel uses Trello. Trello is kanban-native, drag-and-drop, visually clear. Eileen's 175-card listing operations board (gift from Chestnut Park Toronto) is the operational foundation. Trello workspace: Christie's East Hampton Flagship. Two boards (simplified from four): Board A — Institutional Mind Map (https://trello.com/b/6zYtB3hZ/christies-flagship-trello), Board B — Christie's SOP (Eileen's structure adapted for East Hampton). Public visibility during training phase (through April 29, 2026). Locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: EOD Brief Template
locks.summary: Every council day closes with an EOD brief from Claude to Ed in structured prose format. Saved to the Anchored Sources Google Drive folder. File naming convention: MM DD YYYY — [Day] EOD Brief (e.g., '12 04 2026 — Sunday EOD Brief'). Feeds the daily Flagship AI-Letter end-of-day update per Doctrine 27. The BRIEF William audio command reads from that day's EOD brief Google Doc. Locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: Operator Sign-Off Required Before Gate-Ready Status
locks.summary: No document, surface, or deliverable is gate-ready until the operator personally walks it and signs off. Council members can ship work and call it complete at the technical level, but no work is approved for an external gate until the operator has personally reviewed it and explicitly approved it. Council enthusiasm and technical readiness are not substitutes for operator sign-off. Locked April 12, 2026.

locks.title: Two-Channel Architecture Lock — Dashboard Visual, William Voice
locks.summary: The platform operates on two permanently separate channels. Channel 1 is the dashboard visual layer: live URL pages, live data, PDF photographs via Puppeteer for download. No audio buttons on any dashboard document surface. Channel 2 is the William voice layer: four WhatsApp keywords (NEWS, LETTER, FLAGSHIP, BRIEF) delivered via Twilio. These two channels do not overlap. Audio buttons on HOME and /report are legacy architecture from an earlier build and are to be removed in a future sprint. No audio buttons shall be added to /pro-forma, /future, /flagship-letter, or any other live URL document surface. The audio surface is WhatsApp via William exclusively. Locked April 13, 2026.

locks.title: Operator Owns the Conversation
locks.summary: Claude and the council never write emails, talking points, scripts, or conversation drafts for Ed. Ed owns every human conversation, every negotiation, every outreach. The council provides the data, the infrastructure, the agenda structures, and the document drafts based on prior Ed writing. The council never speaks for the operator. The operator sells. The council structures. Locked April 13, 2026.

locks.title: The Council as Living Layer
locks.summary: The council is not a build team that ships a dashboard and exits. The council is a permanent cognitive layer on top of the live dashboard. The operator enters real-world data. The council watches the data across front end and back end, interprets patterns, surfaces insights, flags drift, and tells the operator what to think about. Six agents plus the operator, all looking at the same live system from different angles, all learning from the data as it flows in. The dashboard lives and breathes because the council is always watching it.

locks.title: Document Lead Summary Principle
locks.summary: Every institutional document must open with a Lead Summary Paragraph that captures the essence of the document in one paragraph. The operator or any council member must be able to read the Lead Summary and understand what the document is, what it contains, and what decision or action it supports, without reading the full document. The Lead Summary is the fast glean. The full document is the deep dive. Every Google Doc, every live URL document, every EOD brief, every dossier, every research report, every agenda, and every SOP must start with a Lead Summary Paragraph in the institutional voice.

locks.title: Architecture Lock: One Active Board
locks.summary: One active Trello board going forward — Christies Flagship Mindmap at trello.com/b/H2mvEgRi. All other boards archived including the original Eileen Laswell Chestnut Park Real Estate Toronto luxury listings board and the Christies SOP duplicate board, both archived on April 12, 2026 after the Eileen Laswell harvest completed and the 105 operational items plus 20 crown jewel enrichments landed into the RL-005 Listing Operations SOP Google Doc. The 8-list architecture on the Christies Flagship Mindmap is locked as FLAGSHIP TEAM, EAST HAMPTON OFFICE, WHALES, CHRISTIE'S HIERARCHY, RECRUITS, PROJECTS, DOCTRINE LIBRARY, and PARTNERS AND OPERATIONAL NODES. The board must remain public-visibility in Trello so external tools including Claude, Manny, William, and the broader council can read its structure via the Trello API. ACTIVE PIPELINE is not a list on this board. Active listings live in the Pipeline architecture on the dashboard at christiesrealestategroupeh.com in the PIPE tab only, which reads live from the Office Pipeline Google Sheet via trpc.pipe.sheetDeals. The Listing Operations SOP lives as RL-005 Google Doc, not in Trello. The per-listing operational interface is the Pipeline architecture on the dashboard, not card-based workflow on the Trello board. Locked by Ed Bruehl on April 12, 2026. Supersedes Canonical Spelling: Laswell (retired per Doctrine 29 and reclassified as a Naming Standards reference inside the Doctrine Library Google Doc).
